display.purpose: Hero headlines and animated word cycles only.

shadows.name: glow-cyan
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA and highlighted card lift.

shadows.name: glow-cyan-lg
shadows.purpose: GlowCard hover and strong CTA emphasis.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default 300ms state transitions on buttons and cards.

motion.name: pulse-glow
motion.purpose: Final CTA banner; disable under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Main sponsor conversion action — Become a Sponsor, Contact.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; background: #22D3EE; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #06B6D4; box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(34,211,238,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0a111e, 0 0 0 4px #22D3EE; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #0891b2; }

components.name: Secondary CTA Button
components.description: Outlined sponsor action — Download Pitch, secondary paths.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; min-height: 44px; padding: 12px 24px; border: 2px solid #22D3EE; border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; color: #22D3EE; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(34,211,238,0.1); border-color: #06B6D4; color: #67e8f9; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0a111e, 0 0 0 4px #22D3EE; }

components.name: Glass Button
components.description: Hero secondary action with backdrop blur and pill shape.
components.css: .ds-glass-wrap { display: inline-flex; position: relative; } .ds-glass-btn { all: unset; box-sizing: border-box; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 12px 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(56,189,248,0.2); border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(56,189,248,0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(180%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px) saturate(180%); color: #38bdf8; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; } .ds-glass-btn:hover { background: rgba(56,189,248,0.25); border-color: rgba(56,189,248,0.4); transform: scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(56,189,248,0.25); } .ds-glass-btn:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0a111e, 0 0 0 4px #38bdf8; }

components.name: Glow Card
components.description: Primary content container — achievements, packages, metrics.
components.html:
Top 4 National

Vietnam Robotics Challenge 2024
components.css: .ds-glow-card { border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #1e293b; background: rgba(15,23,42,0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); padding: 24px; transition: border-color 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease; box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(34,211,238,0.25); } .ds-glow-card:hover { border-color: rgba(34,211,238,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(34,211,238,0.45); transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-glow-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #f1f5f9; } .ds-glow-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #cbd5e1; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Contact form fields on dark surfaces.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 36px; padding: 4px 12px; border: 1px solid #1f2937; border-radius: 8px; background: transparent; color: #e2e8f0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #38bdf8; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #38bdf8; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Section Badge
components.description: Optional label above section headlines — one per SectionHeader.
components.css: .ds-section-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(8,51,68,0.5); color: #22D3EE; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Anchor navigation in fixed top bar.
components.html: AchievementsSponsorship
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 24px; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-link { color: #94a3b8; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link--active { color: #22D3EE; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #22D3EE; }

components.name: Package Card Highlight
components.description: Sponsorship tier with popular highlight and feature list.
components.html:
Gold

Popular

$1,000 – $2,000

  • Logo on robot
components.css: .ds-package-card { border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(34,211,238,0.5); background: rgba(15,23,42,0.5); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(34,211,238,0.35); } .ds-package-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-package-tier { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; color: #f1f5f9; } .ds-package-popular { padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(34,211,238,0.2); color: #22D3EE; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-package-price { margin: 0 0 24px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #67e8f9; } .ds-package-list { list-style: none; margin: 0 0 24px; padding: 0; } .ds-package-list li { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-check { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; color: #22D3EE; } .ds-package-cta { width: 100%; }

narrative.overview:
This system looks like standing on the FTC competition floor after lights dim — deep arena black, slate pit walls, and cyan HUD readouts cutting through the dark. Surfaces are minimal and functional; luminance is earned by interactive elements, metrics, and CTAs. Glass blur and soft glow signal "live system" without carnival neon.

The aesthetic serves a sponsorship pitch: sponsors should feel the team operates at competition grade, not in a classroom craft corner. Typography is bold and legible (Inter throughout). Motion echoes match-day focus — springy hero word cycles, hover scale on cards, pulse glow on final CTA — always subservient to content.

Explicitly rejected: cartoonish kid-STEM palettes, SaaS cream landing templates, purple cyberpunk gradients, and decorative glass with no interaction purpose.
keyCharacteristics: Drenched dark surfaces (#0a111e body, #0f172a cards) with cyan as the sole accent voice
Glow-based depth (cyan box-shadow) instead of heavy gray drop shadows
Inter single-family hierarchy — weight and size carry contrast, not font pairing
Signature components: CTAButton, GlowCard, GlassButton, aurora hero background
Bilingual section rhythm with centered SectionHeader blocks and anchor navigation

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: HUD Cyan appears on CTAs, active nav states, glow accents, and key metrics only. If everything glows, nothing is live.

rules.name: The Fog Floor Rule
rules.body: Muted text (#9ca3af) is for labels and supporting lines — not paragraph body on dark surfaces. Body copy stays Ice Text (#e2e8f0).

rules.name: The Weight Ladder Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce a second sans family. Differentiate hierarchy with weight (400 → 700 → 900) and size steps only.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Cyan glow is a state response (hover, highlight, CTA), not ambient decoration on every container.

dos: Do keep the arena black + pit slate + HUD cyan triad on every new section.
Do use CTAButton or GlassButton for sponsor-facing actions — min 44px height, visible focus-visible:ring-2 ring-cyan-500.
Do apply cyan glow only on hover, highlight, or primary CTA states.
Do use SectionHeader for section rhythm — title at headline scale, subtitle in fog text, optional badge (not an all-caps eyebrow on every block).
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion — replace spring hero animations and pulse-glow with instant or crossfade states.
Do maintain WCAG AA contrast: Ice Text on Arena Black for body, HUD Cyan only on large/bold UI chrome or dark fills.
donts: Don't use cartoonish / kid-only STEM aesthetics — primary-color toy palettes, bubble fonts, clip-art robots. "Cartoonish / kid-only STEM UI" is an explicit anti-reference from PRODUCT.md.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) on new components — existing PackageCard price gradient should not spread elsewhere.
Don't add colored side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px) on cards or callouts.
Don't default to glassmorphism on every surface — reserve blur for GlassButton, GlowCard, and intentional overlays.
Don't deploy the hero-metric template (big number + tiny label grids) as section scaffolding.
Don't put small all-caps tracked eyebrows above every section — one deliberate badge per SectionHeader is enough.
Don't let muted fog text (#9ca3af) carry paragraph-length body copy on #0a111e without a contrast check.
